alternative_parents.description: Organic acids with the general formula RC(=S)SH (R = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: Carbodithioic acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a derivative of thiocarboxylic acid, with the general structure RC(=S)R' (R=H, alkyl, aryl; R'=any heteroatom).
alternative_parents.name: Thiocarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a carboxylic acid group with the formula -C(=O)OH or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the thiol functional group linked to an alkyl chain.
alternative_parents.name: Alkylthiols

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

class.description: Organic acids with the general formula RCS-OH (R=H, organic group).
class.name: Carbothioic S-acids

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as carbothioic s-acids. These are organic acids with the general formula RCS-OH (R=H, organic group).

direct_parent.description: Organic acids with the general formula RCS-OH (R=H, organic group).
direct_parent.name: Carbothioic S-acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
